disabled_state.description: Configuration for the toggle when it is in the unchecked (disabled) state, containing both content data (title, package reference) and visual styling (colors).

view.description: Visual styling properties for the toggle's disabled (unchecked) state, controlling the text and switch track colors.

accent_color.description: Color applied to the toggle switch track when it is in the unchecked state. Resolved as a semantic color path via CascadeColorPackage, with a default fallback to BackgroundColors.tint3.

text_color.description: Color applied to the toggle label text (freeTrialTextView) when the toggle is in the disabled state. Resolved as a semantic color path via CascadeColorPackage.

data.description: Content data for the toggle's disabled (unchecked) state, including the display text and the subscription package to associate with this state.

subtitle.description: Subtitle text associated with the toggle's disabled state. Mapped to the ToggleDataEntity but not directly rendered in the current UI implementation.

description.description: Description text associated with the toggle's disabled state. Mapped to the ToggleDataEntity but not directly rendered in the current UI implementation.

package_id.description: Identifier of the subscription package associated with the toggle's unchecked state. Mapped to the entity but the UI uses the radio button's own package_id when the toggle is off.

title.description: Text label displayed next to the toggle switch when it is in the unchecked (disabled) state. Shown in the freeTrialTextView alongside the toggle.

enabled_state.description: Configuration for the toggle when it is in the checked (enabled) state, containing both content data (title, package reference) and visual styling (colors).

view.description: Visual styling properties for the toggle's enabled (checked) state, controlling the text and switch track colors.

accent_color.description: Color applied to the toggle switch track when it is in the checked state. Resolved as a semantic color path via CascadeColorPackage, with a default fallback to PremiumColors.base.default.

text_color.description: Color applied to the toggle label text (freeTrialTextView) when the toggle is in the enabled state. Resolved as a semantic color path via CascadeColorPackage.

data.description: Content data for the toggle's enabled (checked) state, including the display text and the subscription package to associate with this state.

subtitle.description: Subtitle text associated with the toggle's enabled state. Mapped to the ToggleDataEntity but not directly rendered in the current UI implementation.

description.description: Description text associated with the toggle's enabled state. Mapped to the ToggleDataEntity but not directly rendered in the current UI implementation.

package_id.description: Identifier of the subscription package to use when the toggle is checked. When the toggle is on and the user double-taps a radio button, this package_id is emitted for purchase instead of the radio button's own package_id.

title.description: Text label displayed next to the toggle switch when it is in the checked (enabled) state. Shown in the freeTrialTextView alongside the toggle.

id.description: Unique identifier for this toggle component, used to match it with other screen components via ComponentsGenericApiModel. Defaults to an empty string if not provided.

enabled.description: Whether the toggle switch is initially checked (true) or unchecked (false) when the screen loads. Defaults to false. When true, the toggle appears checked and the enabled_state content is displayed; when false, the toggle appears unchecked and the disabled_state content is displayed.
